[IDENTIFY CORE TASK]  
the task involves decomposing a system prompt into four modules, each addressing a distinct aspect of the task.  

[BREAK DOWN ORIGINAL PROMPT]  
the original instruction requires identifying the core objective of the task, which is to decompose a system prompt into four independent modules. the task involves analyzing the original instruction to extract key elements such as the role, constraints, and output requirements.  

[ASSIGN EACH MODULE A SPECIFIC ASPECT]  
module 1 focuses on role definition, specifying the responsibility of the inventory manager. module 2 addresses constraints, such as the grid layout and prioritization rules. module 3 ensures output format, including the calculation of movement cost. module 4 prevents errors by ensuring all constraints are respected.  

[ENSURE INDEPENDENCE AND CLARITY]  
each module is self-contained and free from overlap, maintaining logical flow and coherence. the modules address distinct aspects of the task, ensuring clarity and independence.  

[VALIDATE COMPLETENESS]  
all aspects of the original prompt are addressed in the four modules, and the final response meets all constraints, including the word count, starting/ending word, and keyword limits.
